meaning: n.蒙特默伦西樱桃(色鲜红,味酸)
examples: There were four of us—George, and William Samuel Harris, and myself, and Montmorency.
In a dramatic freefall, the 275-foot (84-meter) Montmorency Falls plunges into the St. Lawrence River in Quebec, Canada.
There is plenty of opportunity for scenery gazing on the 2.5 hour journey From Montmorency Falls to Baie St Paul, with the leg to La Malbaie running a further 75 minutes.
